subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through divine bounty thou hast turned thy face unto the shore of the ocean of oneness and hast entered that station wherein all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت الهی بشاطی بحر احدیه اقبال نمودی و وارد شدی در مقامیکه جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
